# TeleDirectMD — llms.txt

> TeleDirectMD is a physician-led telehealth platform licensed in 41 U.S. states. Board-certified family medicine physician Dr. Parth Bhavsar, MD, provides secure video visits for adults with non-emergency conditions. Transparent $49 cash-pay pricing. No insurance required. Same-day visits available including evenings and weekends. HIPAA-compliant. LegitScript certified.

## Who We Serve
- [Telehealth for Truck Drivers](https://teledirectmd.com/who-we-serve/truck-drivers/)
- [Telehealth for Gig Workers & Freelancers](https://teledirectmd.com/who-we-serve/gig-workers/)
- [Affordable Care Without Insurance](https://teledirectmd.com/who-we-serve/uninsured-affordable-care/)
- [Telehealth for Remote Workers](https://teledirectmd.com/who-we-serve/remote-workers/)
- [Telehealth for Travel Nurses](https://teledirectmd.com/who-we-serve/travel-nurses/)
- [Telehealth for Small Business Owners](https://teledirectmd.com/who-we-serve/small-business-owners/)

## Core Pages
- [What We Treat — 60 Conditions](https://teledirectmd.com/what-we-treat/)
- [States We Serve](https://teledirectmd.com/states-we-serve/)
- [About TeleDirectMD](https://teledirectmd.com/about/)
- [Insurance & Pricing](https://teledirectmd.com/insurance/)
- [FAQ](https://teledirectmd.com/faq/)
- [Book a Visit](https://teledirectmd.com/book-online/)

## Key Facts
- Licensed physician practicing in 41 states
- Board-certified in Family Medicine
- HIPAA-compliant platform
- LegitScript certified
- Same-day visits available, including evenings and weekends
- Prescriptions sent to pharmacies nationwide
- Cash-pay pricing starting at $49; no insurance required
- Does not prescribe controlled substances
- Secure video visits — no app download required

## Conditions Treated
- [Hypertension Treatment Online](https://teledirectmd.com/hypertension-refills-online/)
- [Diabetes Management Telehealth](https://teledirectmd.com/diabetes-refills-online/)

- [Sinus Infection Treatment](https://teledirectmd.com/sinus-infection-treatment-online/)

- [Migraine Treatment & Refills](https://teledirectmd.com/migraine-refills-online/)
- [Acid Reflux / GERD Refills](https://teledirectmd.com/acid-reflux-refills-online/)
- [High Cholesterol Management](https://teledirectmd.com/hyperlipidemia-refills-online/)
- [Hypothyroidism Refills](https://teledirectmd.com/hypothyroidism-refills-online/)
- [Acne Treatment Online](https://teledirectmd.com/acne-treatment-online/)
- [Asthma Refills](https://teledirectmd.com/asthma-refills-online/)

- [Influenza Treatment](https://teledirectmd.com/influenza-treatment-online/)

- [Erectile Dysfunction Treatment](https://teledirectmd.com/erectile-dysfunction-treatment-online/)

- [Birth Control Refills](https://teledirectmd.com/birth-control-refills-online/)

## Cost Comparisons
- [How Much Does an Online Doctor Visit Cost in 2026?](https://teledirectmd.com/cost/online-doctor-visit-cost/) — TeleDirectMD ($49 flat) vs ER, urgent care, retail clinic, primary care, and major telehealth platforms; verified 2026 cash-pay prices.
- [UTI Treatment Cost: Online Doctor vs Urgent Care vs ER](https://teledirectmd.com/cost/uti-treatment-cost/) — Telehealth UTI treatment $50–$115 total vs. urgent care $160–$320 and ER $1,200–$3,000+.
- [Sinus Infection Treatment Cost Without Insurance](https://teledirectmd.com/cost/sinus-infection-treatment-cost/) — Telehealth $50–$110 total vs. urgent care $160–$320; many sinus infections don't need antibiotics.
- [Sore Throat & Strep Treatment Cost: What You'll Actually Pay](https://teledirectmd.com/cost/sore-throat-treatment-cost/) — Telehealth $50–$155 vs. urgent care $185–$345; CVS MinuteClinic $108–$154 with bundled rapid strep.
- [How Much Does an Online Prescription Cost?](https://teledirectmd.com/cost/online-prescription-cost/) — $49 visit + $4–$30 generic via GoodRx for stable refills (BP, cholesterol, asthma, thyroid, GERD, etc.).
- [Strep Throat Treatment Cost (2026)](https://teledirectmd.com/cost/strep-throat-cost/) — Telehealth $54–$67 (visit + amoxicillin/penicillin VK) vs. CVS MinuteClinic $99–$154, urgent care $185–$345, ER $500–$2,700+. CDC + IDSA + AAFP cited.

## Platform Comparisons
- [TeleDirectMD vs. Teladoc (2026)](https://teledirectmd.com/compare/teledirectmd-vs-teladoc/) — TeleDirectMD ($49 flat, 41 states, MD-only) vs. Teladoc ($89 cash-pay, 50 states, MD/NP mixed, mental health).
- [TeleDirectMD vs. MDLIVE (2026)](https://teledirectmd.com/compare/teledirectmd-vs-mdlive/) — TeleDirectMD ($49) vs. MDLIVE ($85, 50 states + PR, integrated dermatology + mental health).
- [TeleDirectMD vs. Amwell (2026)](https://teledirectmd.com/compare/teledirectmd-vs-amwell/) — TeleDirectMD ($49) vs. Amwell ($79, 55+ insurance plans accepted, 50 states, mental health).
- [TeleDirectMD vs. Doctor on Demand (2026)](https://teledirectmd.com/compare/teledirectmd-vs-doctor-on-demand/) — TeleDirectMD ($49) vs. Doctor on Demand ($99, Medicare Part B, 50 states, mental health).
- [TeleDirectMD vs. Sesame Care (2026)](https://teledirectmd.com/compare/teledirectmd-vs-sesame/) — TeleDirectMD (predictable $49 flat, MD-only, insurance) vs. Sesame ($29–$37+ provider-set, mixed credentials, no insurance).
- [TeleDirectMD vs. K Health (2026)](https://teledirectmd.com/compare/teledirectmd-vs-k-health/) — TeleDirectMD (live MD video, $49) vs. K Health ($35/visit or $49/mo subscription, AI-text triage, no insurance).
- [TeleDirectMD vs. HealthTap (2026)](https://teledirectmd.com/compare/teledirectmd-vs-healthtap/) — TeleDirectMD ($49 flat, no membership, 41 states, MD-only) vs. HealthTap ($129/visit or $44–$59 with $15/mo membership, 50 states, behavioral health, Medicare).
- [TeleDirectMD vs. Walgreens Virtual Healthcare (2026)](https://teledirectmd.com/compare/teledirectmd-vs-walgreens-virtual/) — TeleDirectMD ($49 flat, 41 states, named MD, in-network with Aetna/BCBS/UHC) vs. Walgreens Virtual ($79 general urgent care, $33–$39 condition-specific, 30 states, no insurance, rotating providers, integrated Walgreens pharmacy).

## Use Cases
- [Doctor's Note for Work or School (Online MD, $49)](https://teledirectmd.com/use-case/work-school-note/) — Same-day legitimate doctor's excuse note for adults 18+. Note confirms visit + dates without disclosing diagnosis (HIPAA). No back-dated notes.
- [Online Medication Refills ($49 MD Visit)](https://teledirectmd.com/use-case/refill-medication-online/) — Stable chronic-disease refills (BP, thyroid, cholesterol, GERD, asthma, birth control). Recent labs may be required. No controlled substances.
- [Travel Prescriptions Online ($49 Pre-Travel MD Visit)](https://teledirectmd.com/use-case/travel-prescription/) — Traveler's diarrhea standby Rx (azithromycin), motion-sickness, malaria prophylaxis to low-risk regions, chronic-medication extended fills. No yellow fever vaccine; refer to a CDC-certified travel clinic.

## Symptom Guides
- [Cough That Won't Go Away](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/persistent-cough/) — Subacute or chronic cough most often post-infectious bronchitis, asthma, GERD, or post-nasal drip.
- [Sore Throat That Won't Go Away](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/sore-throat/) — Persistent sore throat: viral pharyngitis vs. strep vs. mono. Centor criteria + amoxicillin if bacterial.
- [How to Get Rid of Acne Fast](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/acne-breakout/) — Acne breakout treatment: tretinoin, clindamycin, or oral antibiotics for moderate-to-severe.
- [Burning When You Pee](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/burning-urination/) — Burning urination is most often a UTI; treated with a 5-day generic antibiotic.
- [Itchy Eyes and Runny Nose](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/allergy-symptoms/) — Allergic rhinitis treated with prescription nasal steroids and antihistamines.
- [White Spots on Tonsils](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/strep-throat/) — Strep throat features and treatment with amoxicillin; mononucleosis differential.
- [Pimples That Won't Go Away](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/cystic-acne/) — Persistent acne: combination tretinoin + oral antibiotic; isotretinoin needs in-person dermatology.
- [Pressure Behind Eyes and Face](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/sinus-pressure/) — Sinus pressure usually from sinusitis; antibiotics only when bacterial pattern (10+ days).
- [Is Bronchitis Contagious?](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/bronchitis/) — Acute bronchitis is usually viral and contagious 7–10 days; antibiotics rarely needed.
- [Itchy Vaginal Discharge](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/yeast-infection/) — Yeast infection treated with single-dose fluconazole; BV and STIs differ.
- [Trouble Getting or Keeping an Erection](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/erectile-dysfunction/) — ED is usually vascular or hormonal; generic sildenafil $1–$5/dose with GoodRx.
- [Heartburn After Eating Every Day](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/acid-reflux/) — Heartburn 2+ times/week is GERD; PPIs (omeprazole) first-line.
- [Pink Eye Symptoms](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/pink-eye/) — Pink eye usually viral; bacterial conjunctivitis treated with antibiotic eye drops.
- [Migraine That Lasts for Days](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/migraine/) — Status migrainosus treatment: triptans, anti-nausea, preventive therapy.
- [Ear Hurts When I Swallow](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/ear-pain/) — Ear pain referred from sore throat or middle-ear/swimmer's-ear infection.
- [Stuffy Nose and Yellow Mucus](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/sinus-infection/) — Yellow mucus alone is not bacterial; duration determines whether antibiotics help.
- [Cold Sore on Lip](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/cold-sore/) — HSV-1 outbreak; oral acyclovir or valacyclovir within 48h shortens episodes.
- [Birth Control Online Prescription](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/birth-control/) — Birth control online: $49 visit, generic pill $15–$50/month, no pelvic exam required.
- [Itchy Red Skin Rash](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/skin-rash/) — Eczema, contact dermatitis, or allergic reaction; topical corticosteroid resolves most.
- [Wheezing at Night](https://teledirectmd.com/symptoms/asthma/) — Nighttime wheezing usually undertreated asthma; rescue + controller inhaler.
